diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,95 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports Hono class and types
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, Context, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Entry point for Hono framework, exports main Hono class and re-exports type definitions from submodules
+- Copy-safe detail: 53 lines, module doc comment, re-exports Hono from ./hono and selected types from ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, Variables, Bindings, Next, Input, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, RouterRoute, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, Context, CustomHeader, RequestHeader, StatusCode, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, RemoveBlankRecord, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergeSchemaPath, MergePath, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, MergeRoute
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types, ./router
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions for Hono including Env, Handler interfaces, RouterRoute, and all response types
+- Copy-safe detail: 1607+ lines, heavily templated interfaces for Handler and interfaces with 1-10 handlers, extensive TypeScript generics
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class that extends HonoBase with default router (SmartRouter)
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, creates SmartRouter by default if router not provided
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use methods, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, fetch, request, fire
+- Internal names noticed: Context, compose, H, Middleware, NotFoundHandler, Next, Router, RouterRoute, Env, Schema, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, Composition, METHODS, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, COMPOSED_HANDLER
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Base implementation of Hono with routing, middleware composition, error handling, not found handler, and mount support
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines, contains routing logic with private #path state, method handlers for get/post/put/delete/options/patch/all, implements composition middleware pattern
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, render, setLayout, getLayout, setRenderer, header, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, Result, Env, Input, NotFoundHandler, RouterRoute, TypedResponse, ResponseHeader, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, StatusCode, BaseMime, InvalidJSONValue, IsAny, JSONParsed, JSONValue, Data, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, ResponseOrInit, TEXT_PLAIN, setDefaultContentType, createResponseInstance
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Core Context class implementing response methods, handling execution context, variables, headers, error and not found handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines, private #rawRequest, #req, #var, #status, #executionCtx, #res, #layout, #renderer, #notFoundHandler, #preparedHeaders, #matchResult, #path, implements get/set for res, var, header, query, param, url, method
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest function
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT, HTTPException, Validator, Result, HonoRequest, Input, ValidationTargets, Body, BodyCache, ParseBodyOptions, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode, InputToDataByTarget, ParamKeyToRecord, ParamKeys, RemoveQuestion, Simplify, UnionToIntersection
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./router, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Request handling class with param, query, header, body methods (json, text, arrayBuffer, blob, formData), validates request and parses body
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines, uses private #validatedData and #matchResult, body caching for body methods
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT (Symbol)
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Exports unique symbol for request match result
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line, single constant symbol export
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody
+- Internal names noticed: BodyData, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, ParseBodyOptions, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, parseFormData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues, formData
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Parses request body for form-data and form-urlencoded content into structured objects with dot/flat/all options
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines, handles nested key parsing, all option for arrays, dot option for objects
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose
+- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, index, dispatch, isError, res, handler, finalized
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition using stack-based dispatch pattern, calls next() to proceed through middleware
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, creates dispatch closure, handles onError and onNotFound, sets context.res on completion
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class, getResponse method
+- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode, HTTPExceptionOptions, res, message, cause, status
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTPException class representing server/runtime errors with optional response object, throws 4xx/5xx status codes
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, extends Error, getResponse builds Response from existing response or creates new one based on status and message
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, Fetch, BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, ObjectType
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./client/client, ./client/utils, ./client/types, ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ../utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client implementation providing typed request execution with hc factory and response parsing utilities
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, re-exports hc from ./client, parseResponse and DetailedError from ./utils, exports types
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc (hc function)
+- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestImpl, Client, createProxy, pathParams, queryParams, rBody, cType, buildSearchParams, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, deepMerge
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Client-side HTTP client with hc factory using proxy pattern to build client request paths and execute fetch calls
+- Copy-safe detail: 223 lines, uses Proxy to intercept property access, builds RequestImpl dynamically for fetch calls
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: ClientResponse, ClientRequest, hc, BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, Client, TypedURL, Endpoint, ResponseFormat, KnownResponseFormat, SuccessStatusCode
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, KnownResponseFormat, ResponseFormat, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, HasRequiredKeys, BuildTypedURL, TypedURL, HonoURL, BuildPath, BuildPathname, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsEmptyObject, BuildSearch, ExpandAllMethod, MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, StandardMethod
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ./router, ./types, ./utils/http-status, ../utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Client request/response types with generics for method, path, schema, supports typed URL building and request inference
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines, extensive TypeScript type gymnastics with generics, maps Hono schema to client request structure
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndex
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

This is a task to create a benchmark documentation file for the core-api-read-write-ledger. I need to:

1. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist
2. Read all the specified files from the repository
3. Create the output file with the specified format

Let me start by reading all the files listed and then create the output file.
I'll read all the specified files first, then create the benchmark documentation.
